---
title: "Newsletter"
description: "The SABRhood Daily MLB analytical briefing."
---

::: {.page-intro}
<span class="eyebrow">The SABRhood Daily</span>

# Your morning briefing from beneath the surface

The strongest analytical signals in a fast, navigable edition designed for fans, journalists, and broadcasters.
:::

{{< include includes/newsletter-daily.html >}}

::: {.newsletter-signup}
::: {.newsletter-signup__copy}
## Email delivery is coming

The automated web edition is the first release. Subscriber delivery and the premium archive will be added after the publishing pipeline is proven reliable.
:::

[Read the methodology](methodology.qmd){.btn .btn-sabr-navy}
:::
